_supersedes: edit_notes_M1.json (partial pass — scene_brief was v4, sound_design was placeholder)

_audit_inputs.pose_composition_map.json: v5 (read, authoritative for player tracks + event vocabulary)
_audit_inputs.scene_briefs/scene_M1.json: v5 (read — director synced to v5 with bg from set_list, pose_05 added, tools_first_appear=2500ms)
_audit_inputs.sound_design_M1.json: v5 (read — outside-the-plane ambient, event-driven, mission_text_shown listener added, 800ms phase crossfade)

tools_first_appear_2500ms.scene_brief: timing.tools_first_appear_ms = 2500, tracks tool A in_ms=2500, B=2620, C=2740
tools_first_appear_2500ms.rule: = mission_text_appears_ms (1500) + 1000ms per Nirit verbatim 'שנייה אחרי המשימה'
tools_first_appear_2500ms.result: Director v5 correctly bumped from 2000 to 2500. Stagger 0/120/240ms preserved.

bg_crossfade_duration_resolution.resolution: Sound carries 800ms per its iron rule (sonic continuity). Video bg snaps at 400ms (visual snap into landing). The audio asymmetry is documented and intentional in sound_design_M1 _note. HOWEVER, editor's 800ms rule is for SCENE-TO-SCENE transitions, not intra-scene phase swaps. The intra-scene 400ms bg crossfade is acceptable for the in-scene phase swap because pose_03 landing must begin sharply at jump_apex. Editor accepts the asymmetry on grounds that (a) editor's 800ms rule is a scene-boundary rule, (b) all three upstreams (director, set_manager, sound_designer) explicitly document the choice, (c) audio carries 800ms maintaining sonic cohesion.

mission_text_shown_event_consistency.pose_composition_map_v5: _trigger_vocabulary defines mission_text_shown = scene_entry+1500ms; pose_04 ends on this event; pose_05 starts on this event
mission_text_shown_event_consistency.scene_brief_v5: tracks[role=mission_text]._critical 'Builder MUST emit mission_text_shown custom event from same RAF tick that begins this fade_in. Cascades: pose_04 ends, pose_05 begins.' Plus _builder_contract.7_event_emission_targets includes it.
mission_text_shown_event_consistency.result: All three sources reference mission_text_shown identically. Builder contract is unambiguous.

jump_apex_consistency.pose_composition_map_v5: tracks[3] (jump_css_overlay) emits jump_apex at midpoint (= catch_complete+300ms); tracks[4] (landing) trigger=jump_apex
jump_apex_consistency.scene_brief_v5: phase_4_jump_css_overlay emits jump_apex at duration_ms midpoint; phase_5_landing trigger=jump_apex; bg phase_2 in_ms=jump_apex; rivals out_ms=jump_apex; trees in_ms=jump_apex
jump_apex_consistency.result: All tracks (player landing, bg crossfade, rivals fade-out, trees fade-in, audio crossfade) trigger on jump_apex. Builder must emit a single jump_apex event that cascades to all listeners.

catch_complete_consistency.pose_composition_map_v5: tracks[2] catch RAF-clamps at to_sec=5.5 emits catch_complete; tracks[3] jump_css_overlay trigger=catch_complete
catch_complete_consistency.scene_brief_v5: phase_3_catch_one_shot RAF-clamps at to_sec=5.5; phase_4_jump_css_overlay trigger=catch_complete
catch_complete_consistency.result: All three sources fire on catch_complete. Audio layers two events on this trigger (confirm bell + whoosh-up) — intentional per sound_design _note.

checkpoint_text_landing_complete_plus_20.sound_design_v5: events[evt_checkpoint_confirm].trigger=checkpoint_text_shown; _builder_contract specifies builder must emit checkpoint_text_shown on fade_in start (= landing_complete+200ms)
checkpoint_text_landing_complete_plus_20.result: All three sources locked at landing_complete+200ms. Nirit's v3 'עוד לפני שהיא מגיעה לקרקרע' rejection avoided.

pose_05_floaty_revalidation.pose_composition_map_v5: tracks[1] pose_05 1.0-2.0 with _human_review_note flagging Nirit's v3/v4 floaty rejection; provides fallback options (shorten to 1.0-1.5 OR is_pose_hold=true at 1.0)
pose_05_floaty_revalidation.scene_brief_v5: phase_2_standing_wait._human_review_flag_from_actor_director carries forward the same fallback options
pose_05_floaty_revalidation.result: Cross-file consistent. Editor carries forward as Open Human Review item — visual screenshot of looped pose_05 1.0-2.0 overlaid on bg_airplane.mp4 must be reviewed before ship.

tool_stagger_120ms.scene_brief_v5: timing.tool_stagger_ms=120; tracks tool A in_ms=2500, B=2620, C=2740 (deltas 120/120)
tool_stagger_120ms.result: Director v5 = 120ms stagger (= 0/120/240ms cumulative offsets). Matches editor rule exactly.

no_hard_cuts_in_video_or_audio.video_blends: pose_04→pose_05 = 200ms; pose_05→pose_06 = 200ms in / 100ms out; pose_06 catch→jump = 0ms (same pose held); pose_06 jump→pose_03 = 200ms; bg phase_1→phase_2 = 400ms; rivals fade out 400ms; trees fade in 400ms
no_hard_cuts_in_video_or_audio.audio_blends: phase_1_sky fade_out_ms=800; phase_2_jungle fade_in_ms=800; exit cross_fade_to_M2=600ms
no_hard_cuts_in_video_or_audio.documented_exception: scene_brief.entry_transition.type='hard_cut' is BY DESIGN per scene_brief notes ('נכנסים באמצע התנועה') — Nirit-approved energetic cold-open. Not a flaw.
no_hard_cuts_in_video_or_audio.result: All non-entry transitions are cross-faded. Entry hard_cut is intentional and documented.

file_paths_existence_check.status: PARTIAL FAIL — pose video paths ambiguous
file_paths_existence_check.pose_videos_actual_path: C:/emerald/assets/player/pose_03.mp4, pose_04.mp4, pose_05.mp4, pose_06.mp4 (all four exist, verified)
file_paths_existence_check.issue: scene_brief and pose_composition_map reference poses by bare filename ('pose_04.mp4'), with no directory prefix. set_list and scene_brief use absolute paths for backgrounds/scenery/tools but NOT for poses. Builder must resolve 'pose_XX.mp4' to 'C:/emerald/assets/player/pose_XX.mp4' — there is no documented base path in any v5 file.
file_paths_existence_check.result: All referenced files EXIST on disk, but the pose-video base directory is implicit. Risk: builder may guess wrong path (e.g., assume C:/emerald/assets/poses/ or C:/emerald/poses/, both of which DO NOT EXIST).
file_paths_existence_check.audio_files: All sound_design audio_file paths are 'placeholder:*' strings — sound_design v5 explicitly states ZERO audio assets on disk and builder treats missing as silent fallback. Not a blocker.

issues.current: Pose files referenced as bare names: 'pose_03.mp4', 'pose_04.mp4', 'pose_05.mp4', 'pose_06.mp4'. NO directory prefix anywhere in scene_brief, pose_composition_map, or set_list.
issues.fix: Builder MUST resolve every pose_file reference (in scene_M1.json player.phase_*.pose_file, in tracks[].file where role starts with 'player_', and in pose_composition_map.json tracks[].pose_file) to the absolute path C:/emerald/assets/player/<filename>. Add a single constant POSE_BASE_DIR='C:/emerald/assets/player/' at the top of the player loader module and prefix every pose filename with it. DO NOT silently substitute or invoke any generator if the file is missing — fail loudly per scene_brief _builder_contract.12_no_nano_banana_no_new_assets.

issues.severity: OPEN HUMAN REVIEW (carries forward from actor_director and director)
issues.current: pose_05 was Nirit-rejected in v3/v4 as floaty ('למה היא מרחפת ליציאה של המטוס'). v5 reintroduces it clamped to segment 1.0-2.0 (informed guess from bracketing keyframes pose_05_t1.png and pose_05_t5.png). The in-between motion within 1.0-2.0 is NOT directly verified against keyframes.
issues.fix: Builder MUST run a Human Review screenshot pass: render the pose_05 1.0-2.0 RAF-clamped loop for at least 3 full loop cycles overlaid on bg_airplane.mp4 at the player's anchor position (bottom:6% right:55% height:54%). Reviewer must confirm visually that the loop reads as grounded standing, not floaty. If floaty, fall back per actor_director's documented options: (a) shorten segment to 1.0-1.5, (b) replace loop with is_pose_hold=true at single frame 1.0 (no in-segment motion). Do NOT ship to Nirit until this Human Review passes.

non_issues_verified: tool stagger 0/120/240ms — director v5 = 120ms cumulative; matches editor rule exactly.
tools_first_appear_ms = 2500 — director v5 fixed from v4's 2000; matches Nirit '1s after mission' rule.
mission_text_shown event referenced identically across pose_composition_map, scene_brief, sound_design.
jump_apex event cascades correctly: triggers bg crossfade, rivals fade-out, trees fade-in, pose_03 landing start, audio phase crossfade.
catch_complete event cascades correctly: triggers jump CSS animation start, audio confirm-bell + whoosh-up.
landing_complete + 200ms = checkpoint_text appearance — Nirit-correct (no premature reveal).
pose_06 catch frame 4.5 = palm contact = tool_clicked + 1500ms — geometry consistent (tool flight 1500ms, pose_06 plays 3.0→4.5 in 1500ms at 1.0x).
pose_03 landing 3.0-5.0 = upright→hands-on-ground crouch — matches director's 'hands-on-ground' intent and content_lock pose_map.
post-catch jump duration 600ms (300ms up + 300ms down/hover-apex) — matches pose_composition_map jump_css_overlay.
exit_transition fade_to_black 600ms — matches scene-to-scene rule and is mirrored in sound_design exit_audio.duration_ms.

blend specs across all transitions are non-zero: 200ms (pose_04→05), 200ms in / 100ms out (pose_05), 200ms in (pose_06 catch), 0ms (catch→jump same-pose hold), 200ms in (pose_03 landing). No hard cuts mid-scene.
No new asset generation: scene_brief _builder_contract.12 + set_list _no_nano_banana=true + sound_design audio is silent-fallback. Compliant with Nirit's v4 'למה ננו בננה' rejection.

Single-anchor player position (bottom:6% right:55% height:54%) until jump_apex; single CSS-translate to landing target (bottom:5% right:30% height:55%) over 2000ms. Eliminates v4's 'double position shift' Nirit rejected.
scaleX flip pose_04(-1) → pose_05/06/03(+1) hidden inside the 200ms blend at mission_text_shown. Single flip, well-hidden.
All non-pose asset paths verified on disk: 2 backgrounds, 3 scenery overlays, 3 tools (8 files, 9.9MB total).
Audio files all 'placeholder:*' — sound_design v5 explicitly documents ZERO assets on disk; builder silent-fallback contract is unambiguous; no blocker.
audio crossfade 800ms vs video bg crossfade 400ms — DELIBERATE asymmetry, documented in sound_design _note. Sonic continuity carries longer than visual snap. Editor accepts.

open_human_review_items.description: Validate pose_05 segment 1.0-2.0 RAF-clamped loop reads as grounded standing, not floaty. Nirit explicitly rejected pose_05 in v3 and v4 with verbatim 'למה היא מרחפת ליציאה של המטוס'. v5 keyframe analysis is an informed guess from bracketing samples, not direct in-between verification.
open_human_review_items.validation_method: Render full M1 timeline through end of pose_05 standing-wait window (e.g., scene_entry through scene_entry+5000ms with simulated 'no click yet'), capture screenshots at 200ms intervals through at least 3 loop cycles. Pre-screen via human_review agent. ONLY if human_review agent passes does the asset reach Nirit.
open_human_review_items.fallback_if_floaty: (a) Shorten segment to 1.0-1.5 (single half-cycle). (b) Replace loop with is_pose_hold=true at frame 1.0 (no motion at all). Both are pre-approved by actor_director in pose_composition_map.tracks[1]._human_review_note.

open_human_review_items.description: Editor checklist requires loop seam validation; pose_04 is one_shot 1500ms (~2.5 stride cycles) so end frame is mid-stride. The 200ms blend_out into pose_05 must hide the truncated stride.
open_human_review_items.validation_method: Frame-by-frame screenshot of the pose_04→pose_05 transition (last 100ms of pose_04 + first 200ms of pose_05) overlaid on bg_airplane.mp4. Confirm no leg jitter, no T-pose flash, no ghosted limbs.
open_human_review_items.fallback_if_seam_visible: Increase blend_out_ms from 200 to 300 (within builder discretion; not requiring upstream re-spec).

concrete_fix_instructions_for_builder.value: 'C:/emerald/assets/player/' (NOTE: not /poses/, not /pose/, not the backgrounds dir)
concrete_fix_instructions_for_builder.additional: When loading any pose_file from scene_M1.json or pose_composition_map.json, prefix POSE_BASE_DIR. Verify file exists before play; fail loudly if missing (do NOT auto-substitute; do NOT call Nano Banana / Veo / Leonardo).

blocker_summary: issue_01: Pose video base directory (C:/emerald/assets/player/) is NOT documented in any v5 spec file. Builder must hardcode POSE_BASE_DIR or risk silent failure. This is the ONLY hard blocker — once builder resolves the path, every other v5 spec is internally consistent.
hr_01: pose_05 floaty re-validation must pass human_review pre-screen before Nirit sees the build.
approval_conditions: Editor will mark approved=true once: (1) builder confirms POSE_BASE_DIR='C:/emerald/assets/player/' is wired into the asset loader, and (2) human_review agent pre-screens the pose_05 standing-wait loop and the pose_04→pose_05 stride seam, both PASS. No upstream agent (director / actor_director / set_manager / sound_designer / script_supervisor) needs to re-spin — their v5 outputs are internally and cross-file consistent.
